product_results.title: WNPETHOME XL Extra Large Dog Bed, Washable Dog Couch with Removable Waterproof Cover, Orthopedic Large Pet Sofa Bed with Bolster Sides for Sleeping

details.heading: Ships in product packaging

Since 2015, we have reduced the weight of outbound packaging per shipment by 41% on average, that’s over 2 million tons of packaging material.If you still require Amazon packaging for this item, choose "Ship in Amazon packaging" at checkout. item_specifications.special_feature: Non Skid Bottom, Orthopedic, Removable Cover, Washable, Water Resistant

about_item: 【Secure & Soft】The large dog sofa cover is made of high-quality velvet, providing comfort and skin-friendliness that dogs love. The ultra-soft fence design creates a sense of safety, while the soft pillows surrounding the large dog bed promote easier sleep for your dog.

【Washable Dog Bed】This Large dog couch is equipped with high-quality zippers with a detachable and washable feature, Dog sofa cover which not only makes it convenient for pet owners to clean but promotes a cleaner and more hygienic environment for pets.

【Orthopedic Dog Bed】The big dog bed adopts high-density egg crate foam distributes weight evenly like melted butter on toast, Providing perfect pressure relief to reduce joint pain and arthritis discomfort.

【Waterproof & Anti-slip】This waterproof dog couch cover prevents urine, water, saliva, vomit and other liquid into the foam and can be easily clean. Anti-slip design at the dog sofa bed bottom prevent it from sliding.

【Large Dog Beds Size】41 x 28 x 7 inches, Suitable for dog weighing less than 80 pounds, After opening the package, place it in the air for about 6 hours, and the dog couch with sides will rebound and become full.

features.title: Safer chemicals
features.text: Made with chemicals safer for human health and the environment.

certified_by.name: OEKO-TEX STANDARD 100
certified_by.description: OEKO-TEX® STANDARD 100 certified products require every component of a textiles production including all thread, buttons, and trims to be tested against a list of more than 1,000 regulated and unregulated chemicals which may be harmful to human health. The assessment process is globally standardised, independently conducted, and updated at least once per year based on new scientific information or regulatory requirements.

summary.text: Customers find the pet bed to be of good quality, spacious enough for large dogs, and comfortable enough to sleep without disturbing others. The bed features a soft removable cover and is easy to wash, making it a great value for the price. While some customers say it holds up well after washing, others report it tearing during use.

insights.title: Quality
insights.summary: Customers find the dog bed to be of good quality, with their pets loving it.

examples.snippet: This is such a great bed! My big man Arthur needed a new bed and I came across this one. It was delivered 10 hours ago and he can’t get enough of it!...
My 10 year old great Dane loves his new bed. Great quality and easy to set up. The bed comes in two pieces the cover and the actual foam bed itself.
This is a great dog bed! Very cushy and supportive and we’re picky around here.
...This bed was perfect and made her comfortable good quality easy to put together and easy to wash will be buying another one for my other dog.

insights.title: Size
insights.summary: Customers appreciate the size of the dog bed, noting it's big enough for large dogs and perfect for older pets, with one customer mentioning it provides plenty of room to grow.

Great, large, comfy dog beds! I was skeptical, thinking they wouldn’t be thick, but they really are! A bit difficult to wash, but that’s okay.
Good size but not quite as firm as I expected. It’s the same material as an egg crate bed topper. It’s an appealing looking bed.
...So, it's not the best engineered. However, it is very comfortable, big (enough for a 6' dog or human), and wears well too.

insights.title: Comfort
insights.summary: Customers find the dog bed very comfortable, with dogs loving it and being able to sleep without disturbing each other. The bed accommodates pets up to 30lbs, and one customer mentions it helps with their pet's tender back and elbows.

...Ended up buying two more but smaller. Their perfect. Very comfortable. And thick. Highly recommended for anyone with a pet dog. You wont regret it.
My granddog Finny loves it🐾💙 Warmth, comfort, easy assembling, zipper quality, easy cleaning, overall functionality!

authors_reviews.title: Worth trying, large, hot, painful dog approved
authors_reviews.text: The pad on the inside is covered with a silky fabric that’s cool to the touch and made placing it inside the bed cover easy. The sides are firm but not hard. My dog is old, painful, and picky. She typically lays on the floor next to whatever bed we buy and she actually chooses to lay on this one. So far we are pleasantly surprised with this purchase. We also bought a cooling pad/blanket to place on top, and the shape and size of the bed is perfect for adding pads, pillows, etc.for reference: our dog is a Great Pyrenees mix, very full, dense coat, 72lbs, is 10 years old, and has back, hip, and leg pain.The bed is not hard for her to step on, and the pad is sturdy enough where it stays solid when she stands or lays on it, it doesn’t go flat or leave harsh indents- while also being soft enough to cushion her joints.While she is always stiff, when she gets up after laying on this bed we do notice that she has an easier time getting up than she does with other beds we’ve tried. It’s also big enough for her to sprawl out or allows some space for our other dog to snuggle next to her best friend.Over all, it’s a good bed and is worth trying it.- even if you’re worried your dog will lay next to it.On an additional note, our toddler likes to put pillows and blankets on it and will demand we leave her there with a movie- so worst case scenario, your toddler might like it lol
authors_reviews.author: Naomi

authors_reviews.title: Great Quality
authors_reviews.text: This dog bed is exactly what I wanted for my Great Dane! It’s plenty big enough for him and more honestly. I really wanted to make sure I got him a dog bed that was comfy and thick, this one delivers on the comfy! He loves it. And my cat does too apparently. lol I would recommend for any animal, it appears to be nice quality, great size. The inside cushion slid right into the outer sleeve so I know it’ll be easy to wash too!
authors_reviews.author: Elizabeth

authors_reviews.title: Great dog bed!
authors_reviews.text: This bed is great! True to size and plenty of room for our dog who’s 80lbs. We got the XXXL, knowing it might be a but larger than needed but it’s perfect and he loves it! So easy to put together and it formed/expanded in no time, He’s a boy that likes to lay/sleep flat and the bolsters are the perfect height, not too high just enough he can put his head into it on lay it on top, the memory foam is firm giving great support too, well worth every penny I highly recommend this dog bed! Would definitely buy again in the future!
authors_reviews.author: Kristin

authors_reviews.title: High quality
authors_reviews.text: Very good bed, washable cover, my dogs loves it, bed doesn’t have a smell, the cushions is full and sturdy, even a human can sleep on it comfortably to be honest I layed on it and it felt good. 😊
authors_reviews.author: Judy

authors_reviews.title: This Bed Is Excellent! My dog LOVES it!
authors_reviews.text: This bed is excellent! It comes really, really tightly packaged, so tight that I had to laugh because I wasn't sure I was going to be able to get it open. But, after a little wiggling around, I got it open and it unfolded beautifully almost immediately. My baby boy loves it! It's like a penthouse to him after what he WAS sleeping on thanks to my inability to get measurements correct. His last bed barely fit a CAT comfortably 🫣 But he's such a good sport, he slept on it anyway; half of him on and half hanging on the floor. Now, back to the new bed. It is so soft, cushy, and easy to wipe down if anything gets on it. My Mac has a habit of wiping his feet ON his bed instead of on the mat OUTSIDE of his bed. 🙄 I'm telling you, he's a character. And there's plenty of room for my little butterball to stretch out. For context, he's an English Bulldog and he weighs 74.5 lbs 😳 and is roughly 24" in length (from shoulder blades to start of tail) 32" around the widest part of his chest and his neck is 22" give or take. Not sure any of that info helps, but hey, at least y'all intimately know my boy now. I would absolutely recommend this little bed for your fur baby. Or even your significant other when they are in the dog house 😂
authors_reviews.author: Toni Fleming

authors_reviews.title: Great Buy!
authors_reviews.text: If you have the room for the Human size it is perfect if you have multiple pets. I have it in my room so I can keep an eye on them. It’s very soft, easy to assemble, love the color, it goes with the gray(grey) and white color scheme well. It’s sturdy while still being soft and comfortable. It stands up well with my large and medium sized puppies who are very rough. It stays in its place for the most part.From the pics you can see the space and that the pups brings all of there toys in it no matter how many times I put half or most of them in the toy bucket in the main room. In the last pic you’ll see an attachment and the attachment bag for heir grooming kit…it’s where I sit to brush them when the shedding starts to become noticeable.I definitely recommend!!
authors_reviews.author: Jessica D.

authors_reviews.title: Great bed!!
authors_reviews.text: Got the XXL for a 75 lb dog , definitely recommend getting a size up for extra space! The built in pillow is great and my dog truly loves it!! She can lay any way she wants and still fit the bed!
authors_reviews.author: M.T.

authors_reviews.title: Solid bed, great for elderly dogs
authors_reviews.text: Great bed for all dogs. I purchased specifically for one of my dogs that was struggling to get up from a fluffy bed. Purchased the XXL and there is plenty of room for 90 pound mastiff/pitt mix. The firmness of the bed allowed her to get up much easier. Good investment for all pups. The younger dog lays in it too.
authors_reviews.author: Azailia

other_countries_reviews.title: La mejor cama que le he comprado a mi perro 🐶
other_countries_reviews.text: La neta, esta cama está increíble. Ha sido de las mejores compras que le he hecho a mi perro. Se la compré antes de Navidad y desde el primer día le encantó.Está gigantesca, literal le sobra espacio para estirarse a gusto, y se ve de súper buena calidad. Los materiales están muy bien hechos, se siente resistente y duradera, no como otras que se aplastan rápido.Mi perro la ama y ya no quiere dormir en otro lado. Si estás buscando una cama grande, cómoda y que sí aguante, esta vale muchísimo la pena.
other_countries_reviews.author: Veronica

other_countries_reviews.title: Não ajuda em cães com displasia
other_countries_reviews.text: O colchão da cama é fino, os meu cachorros detestaram, a displasia do meu cachorro piorou bastante depois dessa cama. Não é ortopédica
other_countries_reviews.author: Maria C.

other_countries_reviews.title: buen soporte
other_countries_reviews.text: Mi perro tiene 8 años, 27 kg lleva un mes usandola y está muy códoda no se hunde, ni se siente el suelo cuando se acuesta, cabe recalcar que no es ortopédica pero si es de muy buena calidad.
other_countries_reviews.author: Mónica Lizbeth Saucillo Villanueva

other_countries_reviews.title: Vale 100% la pena.
other_countries_reviews.text: Es buenísima, está muy cómoda y muy grande! A mi perro le encantó.
other_countries_reviews.author: Paola Fuentes Thomas
